name: Red-Eyes Zombie Necro Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼の不屍竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズ・アンデットネクロドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Gains 100 ATK/DEF for each Zombie monster on the field and in the GYs. When another Zombie monster is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from either GY to your field. You can only use this effect of "Red-Eyes Zombie Necro Dragon" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
